title: Casino PoC — UC1 & UC2 Metrics
description: Real-time metrics for Casino UC1 (Real Bet Amount) and UC2 (Turnover Percentage) streaming pipelines.

panels.title: Customers Tracked (UC1)
panels.description: Distinct customers with at least one real bet in mv_casino_real_bet.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS customers FROM mv_casino_real_bet

panels.title: MV Row Count (mv_casino_real_bet)
panels.description: Total rows in the rolling 1-day real bet MV — one row per bet event.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS rows FROM mv_casino_real_bet

panels.title: Iceberg Rows (rw_managed_casino_real_bet)
panels.description: Rows committed to the Iceberg sink — slightly behind MV due to 5s commit interval.

targets.rawSql: SELECT iceberg_rows FROM datalake.public.casino_real_bet_rowcount

panels.title: Total Real Bet Volume (1d rolling)
panels.description: Sum of all rolling_1d_real_bet_amount across all latest customer rows — indicates total exposure.

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM(rolling_1d_real_bet_amount)::float AS total_volume FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (customer_id, currency_id) customer_id, currency_id, rolling_1d_real_bet_amount FROM mv_casino_real_bet ORDER BY customer_id, currency_id, event_ts DESC) t

panels.title: Most Recently Active Customers — 1-Day Real Bet Amount (UC1)
panels.description: Most recently active customers with their current rolling 1-day real bet total. Sorted by last event time descending.

targets.rawSql: SELECT customer_id, currency_id, rolling_1d_real_bet_amount, event_ts FROM (   SELECT customer_id, currency_id, rolling_1d_real_bet_amount, event_ts,          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id, currency_id ORDER BY event_ts DESC) AS rn   FROM mv_casino_real_bet ) t WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY event_ts DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 20

panels.title: Customers Tracked (UC2)
panels.description: Distinct customers in mv_turnover_percentage — union of casino and sportsbook activity.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS customers FROM mv_turnover_percentage

panels.title: Avg Casino Ratio
panels.description: Average casino_ratio across all customers. Higher = customers prefer casino over sportsbook.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(casino_ratio)::numeric, 4)::float AS avg_casino_ratio FROM mv_turnover_percentage WHERE total_turnover > 0

panels.title: Iceberg Rows (rw_managed_turnover_percentage)
panels.description: Rows in the Iceberg sink — one row per customer, upserted on each update.

targets.rawSql: SELECT iceberg_rows FROM datalake.public.turnover_pct_rowcount

panels.title: Total Tracked Turnover (EUR, 7d rolling)
panels.description: Sum of total_turnover across all customers in the latest MV snapshot.

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM(total_turnover)::float AS total_volume FROM mv_turnover_percentage

panels.title: Top 20 Customers by Casino Turnover (UC2)
panels.description: All customers with casino activity, sorted by casino turnover. Full ratio breakdown shown.

targets.rawSql: SELECT customer_id, casino_turnover, sportsbook_turnover, total_turnover, casino_ratio, sportsbook_ratio FROM mv_turnover_percentage WHERE casino_turnover > 0 ORDER BY casino_turnover DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 20

panels.title: Top 20 Customers by Sportsbook Turnover (UC2)
panels.description: All customers with sportsbook activity, sorted by sportsbook turnover. Full ratio breakdown shown.

targets.rawSql: SELECT customer_id, casino_turnover, sportsbook_turnover, total_turnover, casino_ratio, sportsbook_ratio FROM mv_turnover_percentage WHERE sportsbook_turnover > 0 ORDER BY sportsbook_turnover DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 20

panels.title: Casino Source Throughput (rows/s)
panels.description: Row ingestion rate from the two production Kafka sources: src_casino_prd (prd2) and src_bets_gh (prd4). During initial backfill this is very high; once caught up it reflects the live production event rate.

panels.title: Streaming Backpressure (max across fragments — 0 healthy, >1 overloaded)
panels.description: The single most-blocked streaming fragment's output-buffer-blocking ratio (max over fragments of rate(stream_actor_output_buffer_blocking_duration_ns)/1e9). ~0 = the pipeline is keeping up; climbing toward/above 1 = a stage is blocked on its downstream, i.e. overloaded (rate limit too high / compute saturated). This is the gauge that jumped ~0->~6 when the 1000/s rate-limit probe overshot. To see WHICH stage, switch the query to `sum by (fragment_id)(...)` and map fragment_id via rw_catalog.rw_fragments.

panels.title: Kafka Sink Throughput (rows/s)
panels.description: Input row rate for the two Kafka output sinks. After backfill, reflects the live production event rate. Used for PoC R4 latency benchmark — higher TPS = more meaningful p95 measurement.

targets.expr:
sum by (sink_name) (
  rate(stream_sink_input_row_count[5m])
  * on (sink_id) group_left(sink_name)
    max by (sink_id, sink_name) (sink_info{sink_name=~".*kafka.*"})
)

panels.title: Iceberg Commits / min (true cadence)
panels.description: Actual Iceberg commit rate per table. The raw sink_commit_duration_count is per-actor, so it is divided by the actor count to show the true commit cadence. With commit_checkpoint_interval=40 and barrier_interval_ms=250, expect 6/min (one commit every 10s).

panels.title: Iceberg Snapshot Count Over Time
panels.description: Total retained snapshots over time for both Iceberg tables. Rises as checkpoints commit; DROPS when snapshot expiration prunes old snapshots after compaction. A continuously rising line with no drops means expiration is not pruning (compaction still runs — see the per-minute panel).

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('minute', committed_at) AS "time", SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (ORDER BY date_trunc('minute', committed_at)) AS "casino_real_bet" FROM datalake.public.casino_real_bet_snapshots GROUP BY date_trunc('minute', committed_at) ORDER BY "time"

SELECT date_trunc('minute', committed_at) AS "time", SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (ORDER BY date_trunc('minute', committed_at)) AS "turnover_pct" FROM datalake.public.turnover_pct_snapshots GROUP BY date_trunc('minute', committed_at) ORDER BY "time"

panels.title: Iceberg Operations / min — casino_real_bet
panels.description: Snapshot operations per minute. append = checkpoint commits (new files); replace = compaction merges (files reduced). The green compactions line is the time-series proof that files are being merged/dropped after compaction.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('minute', committed_at) AS "time", COUNT(CASE WHEN operation = 'append' THEN 1 END) AS appends, COUNT(CASE WHEN operation = 'replace' THEN 1 END) AS compactions FROM datalake.public.casino_real_bet_snapshots GROUP BY date_trunc('minute', committed_at) ORDER BY "time"

panels.title: Iceberg Operations / min — turnover_pct
panels.description: Snapshot operations per minute for the turnover_percentage Iceberg table. replace = compaction merges firing.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('minute', committed_at) AS "time", COUNT(CASE WHEN operation = 'append' THEN 1 END) AS appends, COUNT(CASE WHEN operation = 'replace' THEN 1 END) AS compactions FROM datalake.public.turnover_pct_snapshots GROUP BY date_trunc('minute', committed_at) ORDER BY "time"

panels.title: Iceberg Live Data Files (rw_managed_casino_real_bet)
panels.description: Current count of live data files in the Iceberg table. Drops after compaction merges small Parquet files into fewer large ones. Not a history — RisingWave leaves the snapshot summary empty, so only the current count is available.

targets.rawSql: SELECT file_count FROM datalake.public.casino_real_bet_filecount

panels.title: Iceberg Live Data Files (rw_managed_turnover_percentage)
panels.description: Current count of live data files in the Iceberg table. Drops after compaction merges small Parquet files into fewer large ones. Not a history — RisingWave leaves the snapshot summary empty, so only the current count is available.

targets.rawSql: SELECT file_count FROM datalake.public.turnover_pct_filecount

panels.title: Iceberg Sink Input (rows/s)
panels.description: Rows received by the Iceberg connector layer. Low in steady state after backfill — reflects the live production event rate filtered through the MV chain.

targets.expr:
sum by (sink_name) (
  rate(stream_sink_input_row_count[5m])
  * on (sink_id) group_left(sink_name)
    max by (sink_id, sink_name) (sink_info{sink_name!~".*kafka.*", sink_name=~".*casino.*|.*turnover.*|.*sportsbook.*"})
)

panels.title: Iceberg Write Throughput (bytes/s)
panels.description: Bytes written to Iceberg per second. Spiky pattern is expected with checkpoint-based writes. During backfill this is high; in steady state it reflects the live event rate.

panels.title: Casino Transactions — Row Count
panels.description: Total rows in de_dev.rw_poc.rw_casino_transactions. Grows with each RisingWave checkpoint commit.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM databricks.rw_poc.rw_casino_transactions

panels.title: Casino Transactions — Minutes Since Last Event
panels.description: Staleness of the latest event in rw_casino_transactions. Green = fresh (<5 min), yellow = delayed, red = stalled (>15 min).

targets.rawSql: SELECT CAST(date_diff('minute', MAX(transaction_created_at), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS BIGINT) AS minutes_behind FROM databricks.rw_poc.rw_casino_transactions

panels.title: Sportsbook Bets — Row Count
panels.description: Total rows in de_dev.rw_poc.rw_sportsbook_bets. Grows with each RisingWave checkpoint commit.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM databricks.rw_poc.rw_sportsbook_bets

panels.title: Sportsbook Bets — Minutes Since Last Event
panels.description: Staleness of the latest bet in rw_sportsbook_bets. Green = fresh (<5 min), yellow = delayed, red = stalled (>15 min).

targets.rawSql: SELECT CAST(date_diff('minute', MAX(placed_at), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS BIGINT) AS minutes_behind FROM databricks.rw_poc.rw_sportsbook_bets

panels.title: Casino — Live Parquet Files
panels.description: Current Parquet file count. High = small-file accumulation. Drops after Predictive Optimization or Dagster OPTIMIZE.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS file_count FROM databricks.rw_poc."rw_casino_transactions$files"

panels.title: Casino — Snapshot Count
panels.description: Total Iceberg snapshots retained. One per RisingWave checkpoint commit. Drops after VACUUM.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS snapshot_count FROM databricks.rw_poc."rw_casino_transactions$snapshots"

panels.title: Sportsbook — Live Parquet Files
panels.description: Current Parquet file count. High = small-file accumulation. Drops after Predictive Optimization or Dagster OPTIMIZE.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS file_count FROM databricks.rw_poc."rw_sportsbook_bets$files"

panels.title: Sportsbook — Snapshot Count
panels.description: Total Iceberg snapshots retained. One per RisingWave checkpoint commit. Drops after VACUUM.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS snapshot_count FROM databricks.rw_poc."rw_sportsbook_bets$snapshots"

panels.title: Casino — Latest Snapshot
panels.description: Timestamp of the most recent Iceberg snapshot committed for rw_casino_transactions. Stale value means RisingWave checkpoints are not reaching Databricks.

targets.rawSql: SELECT to_unixtime(MAX(committed_at)) * 1000 AS latest_snapshot FROM databricks.rw_poc."rw_casino_transactions$snapshots"

panels.title: Sportsbook — Latest Snapshot
panels.description: Timestamp of the most recent Iceberg snapshot committed for rw_sportsbook_bets. Stale value means RisingWave checkpoints are not reaching Databricks.

targets.rawSql: SELECT to_unixtime(MAX(committed_at)) * 1000 AS latest_snapshot FROM databricks.rw_poc."rw_sportsbook_bets$snapshots"

panels.title: Databricks Iceberg Snapshot Count Over Time
panels.description: Cumulative snapshots per table. Each step up = one RisingWave checkpoint commit reaching Databricks. Flat line = commits stalled. Drops after VACUUM prunes old snapshots.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('minute', committed_at) AS "time", SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (ORDER BY date_trunc('minute', committed_at)) AS casino_transactions FROM databricks.rw_poc."rw_casino_transactions$snapshots" GROUP BY date_trunc('minute', committed_at) ORDER BY "time"

SELECT date_trunc('minute', committed_at) AS "time", SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (ORDER BY date_trunc('minute', committed_at)) AS sportsbook_bets FROM databricks.rw_poc."rw_sportsbook_bets$snapshots" GROUP BY date_trunc('minute', committed_at) ORDER BY "time"

panels.title: Casino Landing — Row Count
panels.description: Total raw Protobuf bytes rows in de_dev.rw_poc.rw_casino_landing.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM databricks.rw_poc.rw_casino_landing

panels.title: Casino Landing — Minutes Since Last Event
panels.description: Staleness of rw_casino_landing based on kafka_timestamp. Green <5 min, yellow <15 min, red stalled.

targets.rawSql: SELECT CAST(date_diff('minute', MAX(kafka_timestamp), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS BIGINT) AS minutes_behind FROM databricks.rw_poc.rw_casino_landing

panels.title: Sportsbook Landing — Row Count
panels.description: Total raw Protobuf bytes rows in de_dev.rw_poc.rw_sportsbook_landing.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM databricks.rw_poc.rw_sportsbook_landing

panels.title: Sportsbook Landing — Minutes Since Last Event
panels.description: Staleness of rw_sportsbook_landing based on kafka_timestamp. Green <5 min, yellow <15 min, red stalled.

targets.rawSql: SELECT CAST(date_diff('minute', MAX(kafka_timestamp), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS BIGINT) AS minutes_behind FROM databricks.rw_poc.rw_sportsbook_landing

panels.title: Casino Landing Bronze — Row Count
panels.description: Total rows in de_dev.rw_poc.rw_casino_landing_bronze after last Dagster re-process run.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM databricks.rw_poc.rw_casino_landing_bronze

panels.title: Casino Landing — Snapshot Count
panels.description: Total Iceberg snapshots committed to rw_casino_landing. Each step = one RisingWave checkpoint.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS snapshot_count FROM databricks.rw_poc."rw_casino_landing$snapshots"

panels.title: Sportsbook Landing — Snapshot Count
panels.description: Total Iceberg snapshots committed to rw_sportsbook_landing.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS snapshot_count FROM databricks.rw_poc."rw_sportsbook_landing$snapshots"

panels.title: Landing Layer — Snapshot Count Over Time
panels.description: Cumulative Iceberg snapshots per landing table. Each step = one RisingWave checkpoint commit. Flat line = stalled.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('minute', committed_at) AS "time", SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (ORDER BY date_trunc('minute', committed_at)) AS casino_landing FROM databricks.rw_poc."rw_casino_landing$snapshots" GROUP BY date_trunc('minute', committed_at) ORDER BY "time"

SELECT date_trunc('minute', committed_at) AS "time", SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (ORDER BY date_trunc('minute', committed_at)) AS sportsbook_landing FROM databricks.rw_poc."rw_sportsbook_landing$snapshots" GROUP BY date_trunc('minute', committed_at) ORDER BY "time"
